purpose: Declare the semantic boundary for verifying acceptance criteria coverage by generated test intent.
mustDo: verify every accepted criterion is covered by at least one test case
verify every test case references accepted criteria
verify test intent canonical paths are declared in canonical spec
emit or support criteria-to-test trace evidence
mustNotDo: require changes to the resolver repository
completionPosture: Generated test projection may proceed only when accepted criteria are covered by test intent.
